buyer: SEO agencies, local businesses, ecommerce brands
unmet_need: Brands are losing visibility as Google Search adds AI Overviews, AI Mode, query fan-out, and agentic experiences, but small teams cannot tell if they are cited, omitted, or misrepresented.
first_mvp: A prompt/query runner plus CSV report that records brand visibility, source citations, missing pages, GBP/Merchant Center gaps, and recommended content fixes.
fast_offer: $199 AI-search visibility audit for 25 buyer-intent prompts
recurring_path: $299/mo monthly prompt tracking and content-fix backlog

buyer: Small businesses, newsletters, outbound teams, agencies
unmet_need: Email authentication and unsubscribe requirements are concrete, but many small senders do not understand SPF/DKIM/DMARC alignment, one-click unsubscribe headers, complaint thresholds, or Google Workspace sending limits.
first_mvp: Domain DNS/header checklist, sample email header parser, unsubscribe/link audit, and sender-limit planner.
recurring_path: $99/mo domain monitoring and campaign checklist review

buyer: AI-built app founders, no-code/vibe-code builders, small agencies
unmet_need: AI coding adoption is high while developer trust is low; non-experts can ship apps without checking secrets, auth, input validation, dependency exposure, or LLM-app risks.
first_mvp: Static repo scanner plus manual review checklist for secrets, dangerous DOM, auth/session risks, dependency exposure, unsafe AI outputs, and deployment headers.

buyer: Customer support teams, SaaS operators, Shopify support teams
unmet_need: Companies are investing in AI customer service, but only a minority have mature deployments; customers still expect faster, transparent, high-quality support and unresolved first-contact issues hurt retention.
first_mvp: Upload FAQ/policy text and test questions, then produce hallucination flags, escalation gaps, missing answer topics, and a regression suite for the bot.
fast_offer: $299 bot QA pack for 50 support scenarios
recurring_path: $399/mo monthly regression run and knowledge-gap report

buyer: Marketing teams, publishers, agencies, SMBs using generative AI
unmet_need: EU AI Act transparency obligations for AI-generated content become applicable in 2026, but most content teams lack an inventory of AI-generated assets, labels, review status, and disclosure language.
first_mvp: A content inventory CSV, disclosure text generator, AI-label checklist, and exportable evidence register.
recurring_path: $149/mo content inventory refresh and label QA
